description: You are an energy auditor calibrating a model for the 4StoreyBuilding project. The building owner has completed an IT equipment modernization on the middle floors (Floors 2 & 3), replacing old desktops with efficient thin clients. Update the eQUEST model by changing the Equipment Power Density (EQUIPMENT-W/SQFT) to 0.65 W/ft² for all Middle Floor spaces (those starting with 'M.'). Do not modify Ground Floor (G.*) or Top Floor (T.*) spaces. Run the full annual DOE-2.2 simulation and save the project.
